description: Deliberate vendor consumption: lib/taskfile.js requires d:/PanWizard/pan-wizard-core/bin/lib/doc-lint/frontmatter.js by absolute path. Validates that PAN's vendored doc-lint modules can be consumed by a downstream tool without npm dep, package.json magic, or path tricks.

META test (vendored doc-lint frontmatter parser is reachable) passed first try. The vendor pattern works: file exists, loads, exports parseFrontmatter, parses task-file frontmatter correctly. Non-trivial because v3.7.0 W4 shipped doc-lint as PAN-internal infrastructure, not as a public dep.
P-401 (sync I/O), P-402 (trailing newline), P-403 (FORMATTERS data map), P-501 (single-line comments around literal **/) all applied as defaults

REAL cross-experiment composition: whoorun's composition.taskfile.md ran whoosort + whoolen as subprocesses, both succeeded, total 128ms. Combined with the earlier whoolen|whoograph pipe, all 5 experiments now compose as a real toolchain. Validates P-602 (composition) at scale.

All 12 tests passed first run. P-701 (saturation as quality signal) holding. With ~12 prior universal patterns acting as defaults, building a non-trivial multi-file CLI is now reliably first-run-clean.
